description: The BMW 1 Series M Coupe, produced in 2011 only, was a limited-run homologation special using a detuned version of the twin-turbo 3.0-litre six from the Z4 sDrive35is. With 335 bhp, wide arches, and a six-speed manual only, just 6,309 were built worldwide. It is widely regarded as the last true driver's BMW.
